ticket.subject: We need the ability to generate an End of Day mani...
ticket.raw_subject: We need the ability to generate an End of Day mani...
ticket.description:
We need the ability to generate an End of Day manifest/SCAN sheet/carrier manifest, containing all our outgoing packages within a single barcode in order to have an efficient pickup.  Right now the only manifest we can generate lists each package individually.

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/settings/carriers/stampsusps/d1e5b6f6-1f04-44b2-a114-f8645472bfe2

comments.body:
Hello Philip,

Good Day!

End of Day manifest/SCAN sheet/carrier manifest is not yet available in the app for Stamps USPS.

I am forwarding your request to our senior team for further review to see if the requested functionality can be provided in the app for your use.

We will update you as soon as possible.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3:

https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1757364924672589
US Customer using MCSL-S app with Stamps USPS for rates and labels.
He is a high volume customer and is requesting a "**End of Day manifest/SCAN sheet/carrier manifest, containing all our outgoing packages within a single barcode in order to have an efficient pickup**".
I did not find any dev_needed tickets for this case, so wanted to check this requirement with the team.
Please let us know if this is something that can be provided.
